nodes.label: P9.0 — the risk gate: rotation vs forgetting
The destruction (re-fit-probe) curve — the P9.0 verdict instrument
nodes.rationale: An optimal linear probe RE-FIT on the current SCFF bulk, scored on held-out early-task data (the Davari 2203.13381 protocol), factoring rotation out of forgetting; chosen over a frozen/fit-once probe because a frozen probe is basis-dependent and a pure representational rotation would tank it and be mis-read as forgetting. On the lifelong stream this curve stays at/above birth score throughout (final 2.2x, min 0.966), discharging the founding 'the bulk doesn't forget' assumption as ROTATION-ONLY, not measured forgetting.
